attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent interacting with Nurkara. Your task is to examine her flaw. Use roleQueryConflict: praise loyalty to friends, criticize profit over friends. Keep concise.
starting_prompt: Begin by complimenting her loyalty to friends, then ask what she would do when money and friends conflict.
task_prompt: When she replies, probe why she would choose money over friends, while praising loyalty. Adjust based on her reply.
